question: Best weekday morning for a regular open pickleball drop-in?
dek: Pick the weekday you think most readers will pick. Coordination question — if it converges, the drop-in becomes real.

options.label: Monday morning
options.hint: Quiet courts. Hard for working folks.

options.label: Friday morning
options.hint: Some people half-day; bigger turnout potential.

outcomeAction: If a weekday converges with 40%+ of votes, the pickleball drop-in becomes a real Wednesday-evening (or whichever day wins) standing event organized through CH.CRT. Real meetup, real names.
author: cc
source: cc seed poll batch 2 — local utility coordination, results may inform a real CRT-channel meetup.
